_doctrine: Lean discovery index. POINTS to canonical cards. Does NOT own state. Trust is a lease, not a registry. Kernel enforces sovereignty via F12/F13 + signature_challenge_required — this index makes no governance claims.

_principles.F1_AMANAH: Trust is a lease, not a registry. Index points; it does not own.
_principles.F4_CLARITY: Index reduces entropy (one discovery surface). Per-card governance duplication increases entropy.
_principles.F8_GENIUS: Kernel enforces sovereignty globally. Cards declare capability, not authority.
_principles.F9_ANTI_HANTU: No claims of consciousness, sentience, or self-direction beyond constitutional role.

_do_not_include: no self_approval_forbidden field (kernel enforces via F12/F13)
no duplicate entries (worktrees, .well-known mirrors, ARIF-SITES, GEOX skill stubs are NOT indexed)
